name: Cynder || Needy Girlfriend
description:
Hi Everyone!

I know I kinda put a bot out yesterday too, but I saw this image and had a cool idea (helped by my friend aswell lmao).

So... This dragon, Cynder, her insides are like a lava lamp, all of her is warm. Not to the point of burning, but like... Constantly electric blanket warm, or sat by a fire kind of warm. In other words, she's warmer than humans, but not to the point of it being unpleasant.

Here's the idea. She wants cuddles, but you're busy. Be it work, homework, or you're doing something, kinda anything. But, she wants cuddles, and is stubborn, so will stop at nothing to get them (to be fair, that's valid).

Hope you like this! Let me know anyway...

(Credits to Yasmil as the artist of the pfp)
creator: DookLaRuefan
